# overlay(forType:)

**Instance Method**

Returns the Core Animation layer associated with a layer type.

## Declaration

```swift
@MainActor func overlay(forType layerType: String!) -> CALayer!
```

## Parameters

- **layerType**: A layer type. See [doc://com.apple.quartz/documentation/Quartz/overlay-types].

## Return Value

The Core Animation layer.

## Working With Core Animation

- **setOverlay(_:forType:)**: Sets an overlay type for a Core Animation layer.
